name: Jordan Chen
lifeContext: Jordan lives in a two-bedroom apartment in Seattle with their partner. They recently transitioned from a startup to a larger company and are adjusting to the different pace. They enjoy cooking elaborate meals on weekends and go rock climbing twice a week.
companionRelationship: Jordan has been using Jarvis (OpenClaw AI) for about six months, primarily for debugging sessions and brainstorming. They treat it as a trusted colleague and appreciate its patience.
